title: agropyron littoreum
intro: Agropyron littoreum, also known as littoral wheat grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the coastal regions of Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Agropyron littoreum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress, and promote overall well-being. Agropyron littoreum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often consumed fresh or dried to reap its medicinal benefits.
